research_topics: BUY-only signal bias in ranging markets

findings.finding: Qwen3 accuracy collapse (59.6% -> 28.2%) caused by confidence calibration map (commit 82bac99a, 2026-05-29) fitted on only 304 samples. The 0.6-0.8 confidence bin was mapped to 28.86%, effectively muting the signal to 97.6% HOLD.
findings.relevance_to_us: CRITICAL — our 2nd best signal is effectively disabled. Fix by reverting or relaxing calibration map.
findings.source: Internal investigation of portfolio/llm_confidence_calibration.py and data/llm_confidence_calibration.json

findings.finding: Three signals (crypto_macro 93% BUY, econ_calendar BUY-only, calendar 100% BUY) dilute SELL consensus in ranging/bearish markets. crypto_macro at 25.2% recent accuracy, econ_calendar at 39.1%. Bias penalty (0.2x) partially mitigates but insufficient.
findings.relevance_to_us: Our consensus is biased bullish in non-bullish regimes. This causes delayed recognition of bearish signals.
findings.source: Internal correlation analysis of portfolio/signal_engine.py lines 569-592, 1283-1412

findings.finding: Momentum cluster (7 signals, 88-100% agreement) has effective weight of 1.70x despite being highly correlated. Dynamic correlation computation falls back to static groups when <30 samples in 30 days.
findings.relevance_to_us: When momentum cluster is wrong, 7 signals vote wrong together. Single-point-of-failure risk. Reduce follower penalty from 0.10x to 0.05x.

findings.finding: In current ranging regime: news_event (66.5%), RSI (56.3%), drift_regime_gate (58.2%) are our best performers. Momentum/mean_reversion dropped to coin-flip. System doesn't dynamically reweight based on regime.
findings.relevance_to_us: Regime-conditioned signal weights could improve consensus quality by 5-10pp in ranging markets. Currently on quant_research_priorities backlog.
findings.source: Memory: quant_research_priorities.md — IC-based weighting plan ready, regime-conditioned weights 2nd priority

findings.finding: BTC spot ETF flows are the strongest single predictor right now: 6-day outflow streak ($2.54B) correlates with BTC weakness. No existing signal tracks this. Could be high-impact addition.
findings.relevance_to_us: New signal module opportunity. ETF flow data available via CoinGlass or similar APIs. 5-day rolling flow momentum as BUY/SELL signal.
findings.source: Market research — ETF flow data from Bloomberg, CoinGlass

findings.finding: check_layer2_journal_activity fires false positives because journal entry timestamps precede trigger timestamps (the agent writes with signal snapshot time, not completion time). 21 violations this week are likely false positives.
findings.relevance_to_us: Creates noise in critical_errors.jsonl. Fix: compare with invocation completion timestamp, not trigger timestamp. Or accept invocations.jsonl journal_written=true as authoritative.
findings.source: Internal investigation of portfolio/loop_contract.py:277 and invocations.jsonl

findings.finding: BTC max pain at $75K vs spot $73.1K. Historically, price gravitates toward max pain within 72h post-expiry. A simple max pain delta signal could capture this reversion.
findings.relevance_to_us: New signal opportunity for crypto. Track weekly max pain from Deribit/options data. >5% gap = directional signal.
findings.source: Market research — options data from Deribit, Coinglass

findings.finding: June historically weakest month for silver (avg -2.1%), July-August bounce typical. FOMC proximity (3-5 days before) correlates with silver sell-off. Our econ_calendar signal partially captures this but isn't silver-tuned.
findings.relevance_to_us: XAG is our primary position. A silver-specific seasonal/FOMC proximity signal could improve timing of adds/trims. Already have seasonality_profiles.json.
findings.source: Market research — seasonal analysis of XAG historical data

recommended_improvements.title: Revert or relax Qwen3 confidence calibration
recommended_improvements.description: Commit 82bac99a broke Qwen3 by mapping 0.6-0.8 confidence to 28.86%. Either revert the calibration, increase the min bin sample threshold (>1000), or use out-of-sample validation.

recommended_improvements.title: Regime-gate econ_calendar in ranging market
recommended_improvements.description: econ_calendar at 39.1% recent accuracy. Add to REGIME_GATED_SIGNALS for 'range-bound' regime like crypto_macro already is.

recommended_improvements.title: Tighten momentum_cluster follower penalty
recommended_improvements.description: Reduce momentum_cluster follower_weight from 0.10 to 0.05 to reduce correlated error amplification.

recommended_improvements.title: Fix contract violation false positives
recommended_improvements.description: Update check_layer2_journal_activity to use invocation completion timestamp instead of trigger timestamp, or accept journal_written=true from invocations.jsonl as authoritative.

recommended_improvements.title: Add ETF flow momentum signal
recommended_improvements.description: New signal module tracking BTC spot ETF net flows. 5-day rolling sum: >$500M outflow = SELL, >$500M inflow = BUY. Data from CoinGlass API.
